title: Run(): manage containers more directly
body: Instead of using the runtime's "run" command to have it handle the entire life cycle of a process when we need to launch one, do it in phases, so that we can handle passing the data between our stdio and the container's.  This will also make it possible for us to set up networking using CNI between the "create" and "start" phases.

comments.body: I would like @mheon to look at this one, since he works in this area more often.
